languages.text: Триасомата распростерт в молитве. С пустым взглядом несчастный бессвязно лепечет что-то, капая слюной на палубу.
The Triasomata lies prostrate, immersed in prayer. With a hollow look in his eyes, he babbles something incoherent, saliva dripping onto the deck.
languages.original_text: Триасомата распростерт в молитве. С пустым взглядом несчастный бессвязно лепечет что-то, капая слюной на палубу.

traits.locale_text: The Triasomata lies prostrate, immersed in prayer. With a hollow look in his eyes, he babbles something incoherent, saliva dripping on the deck.

The Triasomata lies prostrate, immersed in prayer. With a hollow look in his eyes, he babbles something incoherent, saliva dripping onto the deck.

languages.text: トライアスモータは伏し、祈りに没頭している。虚ろな眼差しで、意味不明な言葉を呟き、唾をデッキに垂らしている。
languages.original_text: The Triasomata lies prostrate, immersed in prayer. With a hollow look in his eyes, he babbles something incoherent, saliva dripping onto the deck.

traits.locale_text: トライアスモータは伏し、祈りに没頭している。虚ろな眼差しで、意味不明な言葉を呟き、唾をデッキに垂らしている。

languages.text: 三相体趴伏在地，沉浸于祈祷之中。他目光空洞，语无伦次地喃喃自语，口水滴落在甲板上。
languages.original_text: The Triasomata lies prostrate, immersed in prayer. With a hollow look in his eyes, he babbles something incoherent, saliva dripping onto the deck.

traits.locale_text: 三相体趴伏在地，沉浸于祈祷之中。他目光空洞，语无伦次地喃喃自语，口水滴落在甲板上。

languages.text: Üçyeköz, kendini duaya kaptırmış bir hâlde yüzüstü yatıyor. Gözlerinde boş bir bakışla tutarsız bir şeyler zırvalıyor, güverteye salyaları damlıyor.
languages.original_text: The Triasomata lies prostrate, immersed in prayer. With a hollow look in his eyes, he babbles something incoherent, saliva dripping onto the deck.

traits.locale_text: Üçyeköz, kendini duaya kaptırmış bir hâlde yüzüstü yatıyor. Gözlerinde boş bir bakışla tutarsız bir şeyler zırvalıyor, güverteye salyaları damlıyor.

languages.text: El triasómata está postrado, sumido en sus plegarias. Tiene la mirada vacía y balbucea, goteando saliva sobre la cubierta.
languages.original_text: The Triasomata lies prostrate, immersed in prayer. With a hollow look in his eyes, he babbles something incoherent, saliva dripping onto the deck.

traits.locale_text: El triasómata está postrado, sumido en sus plegarias. Tiene la mirada vacía y balbucea, goteando saliva sobre la cubierta.

languages.text: Le Triasomata est prostré, plongé dans ses prières. Le regard vide, il marmonne des paroles incohérentes tandis que sa salive coule sur le pont.
languages.original_text: The Triasomata lies prostrate, immersed in prayer. With a hollow look in his eyes, he babbles something incoherent, saliva dripping onto the deck.

traits.locale_text: Le Triasomata est prostré, plongé dans ses prières. Le regard vide, il marmonne des paroles incohérentes tandis que sa salive coule sur le pont.

languages.text: Der Triasomata liegt mit dem Gesicht nach unten in Gebete versunken auf dem Boden. Mit leerem Blick murmelt er unverständliche Worte, während aus seinen Mundwinkeln Speichel auf das Deck tropft.
languages.original_text: The Triasomata lies prostrate, immersed in prayer. With a hollow look in his eyes, he babbles something incoherent, saliva dripping onto the deck.

traits.locale_text: Der Triasomata liegt mit dem Gesicht nach unten in Gebete versunken auf dem Boden. Mit leerem Blick murmelt er unverständliche Worte, während aus seinen Mundwinkeln Speichel auf das Deck tropft.
